title: dtn.c: evict_if_needed may infinite loop if all messages fit but total exceeds max
notes:
Commit: 518a7b73e
Added iteration safety counter to evict_if_needed() to guarantee termination even if find_oldest() or buffer state is inconsistent. Updated comment. The pre-existing msg_size > max_bytes guard (lines 132-134) prevents wasteful full eviction for oversized messages.
close_reason: Added max_iterations guard to evict_if_needed(). Logic now guaranteed to terminate. Guard against oversized messages already present and documented.
